info.title: c2ffi.Tool
info.description: Convert a cross-platform C header `.h` to a FFI (foreign function interface) `.json` file for the purposes of generating bindings of the said C library for other languages.

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Convert a cross-platform C header `.h` to a FFI (foreign function interface) `.json` file for the purposes of generating bindings of the said C library for other languages.

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract the FFI (foreign function interface) of a C library given a header `.h` file.

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge multiple target platform FFI (foreign function interface) `.json` files into a cross-platform FFI `.json` file.
